analyst_observations: admin-dashboard baseline scored 100% — likely because the SessionStart hook injects spec-driven rules into all conversations, giving the baseline access to our workflow patterns. This makes that eval non-discriminating.
csv-export shows the largest gap (100% vs 22%) — the skill adds spec tags, TDD structure, implementation log, and coverage verification that the baseline completely misses.
webhook-notifications with-skill missed 1/9 (task ordering) while scoring 89% overall.
The skill's unique value is strongest for: spec tags in tests, implementation log entries, and coverage verification final tasks.
